channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Full Crew
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Applications are open for various Ratings positions within the maritime sector. Interested individuals need to download the Ratings Application Form and send it via email. Further information on vessel types, contract lengths, or joining dates is not provided.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Ratings Application at Avin International S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime business administrator is sought for a reputable shipping company. Responsibilities include global purchasing of spare parts, managing transport orders, assisting with technical and nautical inspections, and supporting software implementation. The role requires a completed apprenticeship as a maritime business administrator or similar commercial qualification, good English skills, and organizational talent. A technical understanding and basic IT knowledge are desirable.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Business Administrator Job at HS Bereederungs GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A year-long internship for students of the vocational college of economics is offered for the 2026/2027 school year. The company is seeking motivated individuals to gain practical experience in a maritime business environment. Applicants should submit a comprehensive application including their earliest possible start date and salary expectations. Applications should be in PDF format.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Internship for Business School Students at HS Bereederungs GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Reederei Jüngerhans is seeking motivated individuals for maritime roles onboard their fleet and for shore-based positions. The company offers diverse opportunities within a friendly, international work environment, emphasizing innovation and teamwork. Applicants should possess fluent English, strong communication skills, and high motivation. Attractive remuneration and benefits are provided. Interested candidates are encouraged to apply or send an unsolicited application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Career Opportunities at Reederei Jüngerhans at JMS Schiffahrts GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Qualified crew members are needed for dry cargo vessel operations. The company upholds high professional skills and safety standards, applying practices from the tanker business. Benefits include fair treatment, timely international salary payments, and structured training programs. Interested individuals should submit their applications.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Dry Cargo Vessel Crew Vacancy at DS Crewing GmbH

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Opportunities are available for qualified crew members on MPP (Multi-Purpose) vessels. The company emphasizes high professional skills and adherence to stringent safety standards, particularly within the tanker and dry cargo sectors. Fair treatment, timely international salary payments, and structured training programs are provided. Interested candidates should submit their applications.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] MPP Vessel Crew Vacancy at DS Crewing GmbH

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Seeking qualified crew members for container vessel operations. The company maintains high professional and safety standards, drawing from experience in the tanker and dry cargo businesses. Fair employment practices, timely international salary payments, and structured training programs are offered. Prospective candidates are invited to submit their applications.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Container Vessel Crew Vacancy at DS Crewing GmbH

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple maritime positions are available for officers and ratings on general and bulk cargo vessels. Required experience varies by rank, with specific seagoing service needed for Master, Chief Officer, Deck Officers, Engineers, Electrician, Ordinary Seaman, Cook, and Fitter. Contract durations range from 3 to 5 months depending on the position. Competitive wages are offered, along with social and health insurance. Opportunities for career development and stable employment are highlighted.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Officer and Rating Vacancies on Bulk Carriers at Navigation Maritime Bulgare Limited (NAVIBULGAR)

item.description:
Location: Trinidad / Suriname, Worldwide
Description:

Multiple maritime vacancies are available for various ranks including Master, Chief Engineer, 2nd Engineer, 3rd Engineer, Electrician, and ETO. Positions are open on PSV DP2, Bulk Carrier, Container, and Oil Tanker vessels. Contract durations vary from 8 weeks ON/OFF to 4 months +/-1. Joining dates are throughout June, July, and August 2026. Relevant experience and specific visas may be required. Contact for further details.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Officer Engineer Vacancies at Mariner Crewing Management

item.description:
Location: Aberdeen, United Kingdom
Description:

Vessel management services and solutions are offered by Vroon Offshore Services. Shipboard job opportunities are available, including roles for Second Engineer, Cook, and Deckhand. An open application process is in place for those whose ideal job is not currently listed. Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their details to discuss potential suitable vacancies within the company.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Shipboard Jobs - Vroon Offshore Services at Vroon Offshore Services Ltd.
